name: arXiv — Mistral 7B paper metadata + abstract
goal:
Open https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.06825 (the Mistral 7B paper) and extract metadata.

Return ONLY a JSON object with EXACTLY these three keys:
  - "title": the paper title (string, must contain 'Mistral')
  - "first_author": the name of the first author listed (string, e.g. 'Albert Q. Jiang')
  - "abstract_first_50_chars": the first 50 characters of the abstract text exactly as displayed (string, NOT truncated by you — just the verbatim first 50 chars)

Example correct output (the values will differ for the actual paper):
  {"title": "Mistral 7B", "first_author": "Albert Q. Jiang", "abstract_first_50_chars": "We introduce Mistral 7B, a 7-billion-parameter lan"}

Do not include any extra fields. Complete with EXACTLY this JSON object as your final result.
